subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God, Who hath revealed the verses and made manifest the clear proofs, and hath spoken that wherewith all created things have spoken [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی انزل الایات و اظهر البینات و نطق بما نطق به الکائنات انه لا
subcodes.subjects: @Hands of the Cause, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @business; financial; property matters
